summary: Comprehensive testing of DJERBA CONSTRUCTION CRM - EDIMCO Project completed. All 11 requested features tested and working. Backend APIs 100% functional (16/16 tests passed). Frontend UI fully operational with EDIMCO data display, filters, pagination, and edit functionality.
passed_tests: Dashboard displays EDIMCO stats (264 logements, blocs A-H with counts) - SUCCESS
API /api/dashboard returns blocs_stats with 8 blocs (A-H) - SUCCESS
Appartements page displays table with filters by bloc (A-H) - SUCCESS
Filter by type (F2/F3/F4/F4 Duplex) available - SUCCESS
Search by lot number works (tested with lot 37) - SUCCESS
Pagination works (30 items per page, 9 pages total) - SUCCESS
Edit apartment dialog opens with all fields (lot, bloc, type, etage, prix, surfaces, statut) - SUCCESS
Excel export button present and functional - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: 298 EDIMCO lots already seeded (264 logements, 8 commerces, 24 services, 1 parking, 1 creche)
context_for_next_testing_agent: EDIMCO CRM fully functional. 298 lots in database across 8 blocs (A-H). Dashboard shows bloc-by-bloc stats. Appartements page has table view with filters (bloc, destination, type), search by lot, pagination (30/page). Edit dialog allows status modification. Auth uses Bearer token in Authorization header. All APIs require authentication except login.
